title: 20 Most Memorable Moments of the Expanded Universe

"'''20 Most Memorable Moments of the Expanded Universe'''" is a 10-page reference article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 83|''Star Wars Insider'' 83]]. It was written by [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Enrique Guerrero]], with illustrations by [[Joe Corroney]].

==Contents==
[[File:Best_of_EU.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Best of the EU]]
*'''Introduction'''
*'''The 20 Most Memorable Moments'''
**The [[Destruction of Sernpidal|Death]] of [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]
**[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] [[Thank the Maker|Remembers]] [[C-3PO/Legends|See-Threepio]]
**[[Battle of Hypori/Legends|Enter]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]
**Heirs of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]: [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] [[Duel on Yavin 4|Meets]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]
**The [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Artistic Fate]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]
**[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] [[A Barve Like That: The Tale of Boba Fett|Escapes]] the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]]
**[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] Descends into the [[The New Jedi Order: Traitor|Rings of Hell]]
**[[Borsk Fey'lya]], [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|A Noble End]] for the Guy You Love To Hate
**[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] [[Duel on Mimban|Duels]] with Darth Vader for the First Time... [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye|Before]] [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']]
**The [[Halmad campaign|Death]] of [[Ton Phanan]]
**Darth Vader [[Resurrection (comic story)|vs.]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]
**Luke [[Skirmish on Kinooine|vs.]] [[Lumiya]]
**Luke Skywalker [[Star Wars: The Jedi Academy Trilogy|Creates]] a [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]]
**[[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] Appears on the [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|Big Screen]]
**[[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], [[Darksaber (novel)|A Life in Service]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
**[[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith|Gives in to the]] [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]]
**The [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Redemption|Redemption]] of [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]]
**The [[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point|Pregnancy]] of [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]
**The [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] [[Star Wars: Dark Empire|Reborn]]
**[[Ganner Rhysode]], [[Battle of the World-Well|A Hero at the Gates]]
*'''The Five Goofiest Moments of the ''Star Wars'' Mythos'''
**Introducing [[Jaxxon/Legends|Jaxxon]], The [[Lepi/Legends|Lepus-carnivorous]]
**The [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|Villainy]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Trioculus]] and [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Bertroff Hissa|Hissa]]
**[[The Star Wars Holiday Special|Take Your Pick]]
**[[The Ewoks and the Magic Sunberries|Ewoks... on Ice]]!
**[[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and Luke [[Planet of Kadril|in Drag]]?
